properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I keep trying to find a life On my own, apart from you I am the king of excuses I've got one for every selfish thing that I'll do

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, what's going on inside of me? I despise my own behavior This only serves to confirm my suspicions I'm still a man in need of a Saviour

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I wanna be in the light as you are in the light I wanna shine like the stars in the heavens Oh, Lord be my light and be my salvation All I want is to be in the light All I want is to be in the light

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The disease of the self runs through my blood Is a cancer fatal to the soul Every attempt on my behalf has failed To bring the sickness under control

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: In the light, in the light In the light, in the light, in the light In the light, in the light In the light, in the light, in the light

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: In the light, you are in the light In the light, wanna shine like the stars in the heavens In the light, [Incomprehensible] 3. 47 In the light, in the light

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: All I want, all I want, all I want All I want, all I want, all I want In the light of love, in the light of love All I want, all I want, all I want
